title: crepis rigescens
intro: Crepis rigescens, also known as the prickly hawk's-beard or rough Hawksbeard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been shown to help alleviate symptoms of various health issues. The health benefits of Crepis rigescens include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Crepis rigescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal properties, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
